already_have_insurance.response_en: Many homeowners keep a separate policy specifically to protect their mortgage so their family keeps the house.
already_have_insurance.response_es: Muchos propietarios mantienen una póliza separada específicamente para proteger su hipoteca para que su familia conserve la casa.
already_have_insurance.follow_up_en: Would you like to see how mortgage protection differs from your current coverage?
already_have_insurance.follow_up_es: ¿Le gustaría ver cómo la protección hipotecaria difiere de su cobertura actual?
already_have_insurance.psychology: Reframes the objection — they may have life insurance but NOT mortgage-specific protection.

just_looking.response_en: No problem. Would you like a quick estimate while you're here?
just_looking.response_es: No hay problema. ¿Le gustaría una estimación rápida mientras está aquí?
just_looking.follow_up_en: It only takes 30 seconds and there's no commitment.
just_looking.follow_up_es: Solo toma 30 segundos y no hay compromiso.
just_looking.psychology: Low-pressure — keeps them engaged without feeling sold to.

too_expensive.response_en: Many of our plans start as low as $15/month — less than a streaming subscription.
too_expensive.response_es: Muchos de nuestros planes comienzan desde tan solo $15/mes — menos que una suscripción de streaming.
too_expensive.follow_up_en: Would you like to see what's available in your price range?
too_expensive.follow_up_es: ¿Le gustaría ver qué opciones están disponibles en su rango de precio?
too_expensive.psychology: Anchors to a familiar low cost to break the 'expensive' assumption.

triggers: let me discuss with my spouse
need_to_think.response_en: Absolutely, take your time. Would you like me to email you a summary of what we discussed so you can review it later?
need_to_think.response_es: Por supuesto, tómese su tiempo. ¿Le gustaría que le envíe un resumen de lo que discutimos para que pueda revisarlo más tarde?
need_to_think.follow_up_en: That way you'll have all the details ready when you're ready to decide.
need_to_think.follow_up_es: De esa manera tendrá todos los detalles listos cuando esté listo para decidir.
need_to_think.psychology: Gives them space but still captures the lead via email.

not_interested.response_en: No worries at all. If you ever want to revisit your options, we're here 24/7.
not_interested.response_es: No se preocupe. Si alguna vez quiere revisar sus opciones, estamos aquí las 24 horas.
not_interested.psychology: Graceful exit — leaves the door open for future engagement.
